originalTitle: The Iran war costs more than you think — it boosts inflation and threatens stocks
summary: Pentagon’s ‘fuzzy math’ impacts prices and your portfolio.
content: Pentagon’s ‘fuzzy math’ impacts prices and your portfolio.

chineseSummary: 五角大楼的“模糊数学”会影响价格和您的投资组合。

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
